RELEVANT STUFF BLA BLA

Things,

you

probably wonder.

What is formcarry?

Formcarry is a form API (or endpoint) that allows you to collect submissions from your own designed HTML <form> without coding any backend, it basically serves as an form backend. By using formcarry you will instantly access the best features such as getting email notifications for each new submission, file uploads, collecting payments with stripe and more

Can I upload files from my form to formcarry?

Yes, you can upload files with minimum effort to formcarry.

Does formcarry blocks spam submissions?

Yes, formcarry has advanced in-built systems to block spam submissions.

What is form endpoint?

A form endpoint or form backend, is a unique URL that will process your forms and performs the necessary actions to fulfill your needings (spam blocking, email sending, file uploads) in a reliable, fast and secure way. Formcarry is the best form endpoint in the industry.

What happens if I exceed the monthly submission limit?

We will save your exceeded submissions in a secure place until the first day of next month, but you can't see them unless you upgrade your plan. By upgrading your plan you can recover those submissions, so don't worry we got your back!

Does formcarry supports AJAX?

Yes, formcarry supports AJAX in all packages including the freemium package.

Is formcarry GDPR compliant?

Yes, formcarry is fully GDPR compliant. We are committed to protecting your data and ensuring privacy compliance. We process data as a data processor under strict agreements, store data in secure EU data centers, implement industry-standard security measures, and provide comprehensive Data Processing Agreements (DPA) with Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) for international transfers. Learn more at https://formcarry.com/legal/data-processing-agreement

Is formcarry CCPA compliant?

Yes, formcarry is fully compliant with the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA). We respect California residents' privacy rights, do not sell or share personal information for cross-context behavioral advertising, and provide all CCPA-mandated rights including access, deletion, and opt-out rights. We ensure non-discrimination for exercising privacy rights. Learn more at https://formcarry.com/legal/privacy-policy
